approvalNotes: Approved unattended Foundation continuation after DATA-001.
Repair the bounded OPS rollup source/formula path and prove the dead NPS Scores & Reviews dependency is gone.
The only approved external content mutation is the named Freedom Sheet formula repair cells in this plan when live proof requires it.
Do not mutate Drive permissions, ClickUp, FUB, finance, credentials, OAuth scopes, provider config, sends, or broad Freedom workbook surfaces.
Close only with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, and process:foundation-ship.
